g.text: epicd — Human operation set (you are the gate owner; you act only on 👤 rows)
Each row shows a driver indicator:
a work-item whenever you have an idea
read Proposal / Plan → approve / hold / reject
start a work-item (→ Draft; engine refines)
intra-lane sort only — does not change flow
add / remove a lane; set per-phase actor
+ capture. You own DECISIONS (do it? / done right?); the engine owns EXECUTION.
